title: Floor Layers, Except Carpet, Wood, and Hard Tiles
description: Apply blocks, strips, or sheets of shock-absorbing, sound-deadening, or decorative coverings to floors.

tasks.text: Sweep, scrape, sand, or chip dirt and irregularities to clean base surfaces, correcting imperfections that may show through the covering.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Cut flooring material to fit around obstructions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect surface to be covered to ensure that it is firm and dry.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Trim excess covering materials, tack edges, and join sections of covering material to form tight joint.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Form a smooth foundation by stapling plywood or Masonite over the floor or by brushing waterproof compound onto surface and filling cracks with plaster, putty, or grout to seal pores.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Measure and mark guidelines on surfaces or foundations, using chalk lines and dividers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Cut covering and foundation materials, according to blueprints and sketches.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Roll and press sheet wall and floor covering into cement base to smooth and finish surface, using hand roller.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Apply adhesive cement to floor or wall material to join and adhere foundation material.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Determine traffic areas and decide location of seams.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Lay out, position, and apply shock-absorbing, sound-deadening, or decorative coverings to floors, walls, and cabinets, following guidelines to keep courses straight and create designs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Remove excess cement to clean finished surface.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Disconnect and remove appliances, light fixtures, and worn floor and wall covering from floors, walls, and cabinets.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Heat and soften floor covering materials to patch cracks or fit floor coverings around irregular surfaces, using blowtorch.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
